name: SECC-OS — Execution Fabric v1.2 (Property + Contract Gate + Audit)

nodes.name: Contract Validator
nodes.notes: Inline snapshot of frozen Enterprise Contract Registry v2.0 (outputs/contracts/). n8n cannot import repo files; re-sync this block on any registry version bump. Enforces contracts BEFORE execution — invalid decisions are hard-rejected and never reach the executor.

nodes.name: Save Audit — Executed
nodes.notes: Attach Notion credential in n8n UI (DEV sandbox project). Bug 26: cross-project creds can't attach via API.

nodes.name: Save Audit — Rejected
nodes.notes: Contract-violation audit (GUARDiAN approved, contracts rejected). Violations are written into 'Systems Updated' and the full receipt into 'Receipt JSON' so no new DB column is required. Optional: add a 'Contract Violations|rich_text' column for cleaner reporting. Attach Notion credential in n8n UI.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ decision_id: $('Contract Validator').item.json.decision_id, status: $('Contract Validator').item.json.contract.status, violations: $('Contract Validator').item.json.contract.violations, registry_version: $('Contract Validator').item.json.contract.registry_version }) }}

nodes.name: Save Audit — Blocked
nodes.notes: Attach Notion credential in n8n UI (DEV sandbox project). Domain left unmapped — blocked decisions may be non-Property and the Domain select only has 'Property'.
